name: Shot Grid
description: Grid of individual shot compositions with aspect ratio indicators, shot numbers, duration chips, and optional transition arrows for video shot planning.

standard.description: Responsive 4-column grid of shot cards with aspect badges and duration chips for general shot planning and review

flow.description: Linear flow layout connecting shots with transition arrows indicating cut, fade, dissolve, and other transition types for editorial planning

comparison.description: Side-by-side comparison layout showing two shots for A/B review with synchronized playback and diff indicators

visual_brief: Grid of rectangular shot cards with variable aspect ratios. Each card renders a single shot thumbnail with a subtle rounded border. Aspect ratio badge appears as a small tag at top-right of thumbnail (e.g. '16:9', '9:16', '4:3', '2.39:1') in monospace uppercase text against a dark translucent pill. Shot number overlays at top-left as a bold numeric badge (e.g. 'SH-042') in a contrasting pill. Duration chip sits at bottom-right showing timecode (e.g. '0:03.5') with a clock icon prefix. In flow preset, cards are connected by arrow icons between them indicating transition type: solid arrow = cut, dotted arrow with fade gradient = fade, diagonal lines = dissolve, curved = wipe. Arrow color reflects transition duration. Cards selected for comparison have an accent border ring. Hover state lifts cards 2px with shadow enhancement.

slots.shot-card: Individual shot card (d-surface, data-interactive) with thumbnail and metadata overlays. Aspect ratio of card matches the shot's native aspect to preserve composition integrity.
slots.shot-thumbnail: Primary image area showing the shot frame. Fills entire card. Supports still image or first-frame preview of video. Lazy-loaded.
slots.aspect-badge: Small pill at top-right of card showing aspect ratio in monospace uppercase. Background dark-translucent, 10px font, 4px vertical padding.
slots.shot-number: Bold numeric identifier at top-left of card in a contrasting pill. Format 'SH-{number}' or simple '{number}'. Uses primary color background.
slots.duration-chip: Timecode display at bottom-right with clock icon prefix. Monospace font, dark translucent pill.
slots.transition-arrow: Between-card element in flow preset indicating transition type between adjacent shots. Icon visualization encodes transition type (cut/fade/dissolve/wipe) and width encodes duration.

responsive.mobile: Single column with full-width cards. Flow preset stacks vertically with arrows rotated 90 degrees. Comparison preset stacks vertically with divider.
responsive.tablet: 2-column grid. Flow preset maintains horizontal layout with wrap. Badges slightly reduced in size.
responsive.desktop: 4-column grid with all hover states and badges at full size.

layout_hints.shot_priority: Shot identity, aspect ratio, and duration should be immediately legible. Transition or comparison signals support the shot read rather than replacing it.
layout_hints.flow_sequence: The flow preset should emphasize editorial sequence and transition logic, not just spatial adjacency.
layout_hints.comparison_clarity: When comparing shots, keep the selected pair visually tied together so users read them as alternatives rather than unrelated cards.

ambient.transition-arrow-pulse: opacity 0.6 to 1 pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite on active flow
